AC: 17
SV POISON: +10
WT: 6.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL
Race: BAR ELF TRL OGR IKS VAH
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Slot: CHEST
AC: 17
SV POISON: +10
WT: 6.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL

Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Appearance:Chain
Tint:

Page Updated:Sun Apr 8th, 2018

[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Upper Guk
NPC Name
a giant heart spider


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Upper Guk

stats

Uploaded July 5th, 2019 by stickleback
Send a correction
Post Comment
This is so messed up
QuoteReply
# Nov 22 2019 at 5:07 AM Rating: Decent
animekenji
1,123 posts
Ogre can wear this, but they can wear only large. Iksar can wear this, but they can wear only medium. Elf can also wear this, but they can only wear small/medium. So how is it that if Iksar and Elf can wear this, that human, erudite and half elf can't? Why not dark elf? There should be no piece of armor in this game that is both ogre and elf wearable. If it's one size fits all, then all races should be able to wear it otherwise normal size restrictions should apply.

Oh, and All classes? Really? It's quite clearly a chain graphic, so you're telling me that a high elf enchanter or wood elf druid can wear this? Seriously? Even if it was classified as leather, like the small scarab breastplate (another problem item that is classified as leather despite having the word breastplate in the name and a plate graphic), INT casters still should not be able to wear it. This is just as bad as all the plate armor in the game that is Iksar useable despite the fact that the lore clearly states that Iksar cannot wear plate at all. It would be more understandable if this was an item that was added later in the game by employees who weren't around during original era and were not familiar with the lore, but this is an original era item placed in the game by Brad McQuaid's original development team. so they should have known better. The same with all the Iksar wearable plate that was introduced while they were still there.












Edited, Nov 22nd 2019 6:35am by animekenji
____________________________
If you were me and I were you, would we still be friends?
▲ Page top
This is so messed up
QuoteReply
# May 25 2022 at 12:02 AM Rating: Decent
BrandeX
Scholar
112 posts
It's an error in mass updating items. I think when adding Elf Beastlords. You can see how it was supposed to be in the original item screenshot.

Sage
1,252 posts
finally dropped yesterday, after 14 shields and maybe 20-25 hours of camping...

my GF used to say: so, you're after the spider...AGAIN!

well, am a happy camper now 7 AC difference compared to the Patriarchs leather (at my level). plus poison resist plus the cool looks. :)

#Anonymous, Posted: Mar 11 2001 at 11:55 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) i dont know why this one is lvl 15 to attain and the chitin shell shield says lvl 20 when they both drop off of the same NPC. Both drop of the giant heart spider who is about lvl 18-20. blue to me at 23.
#Anonymous, Posted: Mar 11 2001 at 11:53 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post)
#Anonymous, Posted: Jan 17 2001 at 1:00 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) This is a very old picture before Kunark "pending Lore" was the name for "Lore" in the origanal game hehe
RE: Old
QuoteReply
# Aug 09 2001 at 2:26 PM Rating: Default
Darknyss
Scholar
551 posts
Actually, "Pending" means that they are deciding whether or not to make it LORE yet. Sometimes, they like the idea of allowing people to get more of them to sell, or give to younger players... but if these things become highly farmed, overpriced items.... they make em LORE.
____________________________
Pain Lord Darknyss Grimscale
92 Iksar Crusader of the Greenmist
▲ Page top
RE: Old
QuoteReply
# Apr 04 2001 at 1:28 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592341527836
Scholar
188 posts
You are an... nm, I dont want to flame. Dont post if you dont know. Pending lore is an item that they are going to make lore. So if you have a backpack full of em and they finally make them lore, you're sol. So, what do you think patent pending means? Just curious.
▲ Page top
RE: Old
QuoteReply
# Jul 01 2002 at 12:37 PM Rating: Decent
-REDACTED-
29 posts
Actually "patent pending" means the patent is under review. There is an amount of time built in before a patent is issued to allow for others who may have been ripped off(a la Tesla) an opportunity to prove they actualy created an invention. It also allows a review of old pattents to verify that the item is actually new, and not just a minimal redress of something existing.
▲ Page top
Pending Lore?
QuoteReply
# Jan 14 2001 at 7:41 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591749964221
89 posts
WTF does Pending Lore mean?

/boggle
▲ Page top
RE: Pending Lore?
QuoteReply
# Jan 18 2001 at 1:05 AM Rating: Good
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
When they first decided they were going to make some items so that you could only own one of them, they came up with Lore items. To give people time to get rid of extra that they had, for a time they made items that were going to be lore PENDING LORE. They weren't Lore YET, but you have better get rid of your extras, because soon they would poof...

Troglok, Troll Shaman of Innoruuk, Xev server
